subcodes.first_line: O kind Lord! Grant these poor ones increasing perception and capacity. So that we may be different from others
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداوند مهربان عنایتی فرما و موهبتی بنما تا همت این بینوایان بلند گردد و
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
